_publications._publicationTitle: Traditional and systems biology based drug discovery for the rare tumor syndrome neurofibromatosis type 2.

_contextSnippet: Panobinostat was given via intraperitoneal injection at a dose of 20 mg/kg 3x/week and was well tolerated
details: Administered at 20 mg/kg 3x/week via intraperitoneal injection and was well tolerated in schwannoma model
